questions: wifi slow but cable e fast
koto gulo device connect korte pari?
uporer floor e wifi dhore na
wifi security type ki use korbo?
kontar floor e wifi range problem
wifi speed beshi device e kom keno?
answers: WiFi kaj na korle prothome router restart korun. Tarpor phone/laptop er WiFi off kore on korun. ISP Digital er helpline e call korun jodi tarpor o fix na hoy!

Signal weak hole router er position change korun — ghorer moddhe uchchu jayga te, open space e rakhun. Wall, mirror, ar microwave signal block kore. ISP Digital er technician free site survey kore best position suggest kore!
WiFi range baranor jonno WiFi extender ba mesh system use korun. ISP Digital mesh WiFi system monthly 300 taka rental e provide kore — poora bari cover hoye jabe!

WiFi disconnect hole router er firmware update ache kina check korun. Channel congestion o ekta common karon — router settings e auto channel select korun. ISP Digital er router e ai feature built-in ache.

WiFi password bhule gele router er pechone sticker e default password likha thake. Ba 192.168.1.1 e login kore Wireless Settings e current password dekhte paren. Na parle ISP Digital helpline e call korun!
Ek shathe maximum 32 ta device connect korte paren ISP Digital er router e. Tobe best performance er jonno 10-15 ta device recommend kora hoy. Beshi device hole higher plan nite paren.
Uporer floor e WiFi na dhorle ekta range extender lagben. ISP Digital 500 taka/month e WiFi extender rent e dey, ba apni nijer kinte paren (amra recommend kori TP-Link ba Tenda).
WiFi channel change korte 192.168.1.1 e login korun > Wireless Settings > Channel e giye less congested channel select korun (1, 6, ba 11 best). ISP Digital er app e channel analyzer feature ache!

Neighbor er WiFi interference hole 5GHz band e switch korun — 5GHz e interference onek kom hoy. Ar router er channel ta manually change korun. ISP Digital er support team remote e optimize kore dite pare.
Beshi device connect thakle WiFi speed bhag hoye jay — eta normal. Important device gulo ke 5GHz band e rakhun ar baki gulo 2.4GHz e. ISP Digital er QoS feature diye device priority set korte paren.
